name: get_issue_details
description: Get comprehensive details about a specific vulnerability by its Snyk issue ID (e.g., 'SNYK-JS-LODASH-1018905'). Returns the full vulnerability description, CVE and CWE identifiers, CVSS vector and score, affected version ranges, fixed-in versions, exploit maturity, references, and detailed remediation advice. Use this when you need the full context about a specific vulnerability found in a project scan.

parameters.name: issue_id
parameters.description: The Snyk vulnerability ID, typically in the format 'SNYK-{LANG}-{PKG}-{NUM}' (e.g., 'SNYK-JS-LODASH-1018905'). Obtain this from get_project_issues or test_package results.

body.title: Prototype Pollution
body.description: lodash before 4.17.21 is vulnerable to Prototype Pollution via the setWith and set functions. An attacker can inject properties onto Object.prototype through a crafted payload.
